University of Pennsylvania Study

About the dataset

Primary description: Memory and Alzheimers research

The PENN dataset was collected at the University of Pennsylvania’s Memory Center, including participants with memory complaints and early stages of cognitive decline. Data collection is compatible with the standard National Alzheimer’s Coordinating Center’s uniform data set.
Study University of Pennsylvania (PENN) Study
Study Website PENN
Data Descriptor Paper https://doi.org/10.1136/jnnp-2012-302548
DUA Please contact Dr. Christos Davatzikos to obtain the DUA for the derived data and request an introduction to the study PI to obtain the DUA for the raw data.
Country/Region USA
Disease Tag alzheimers
Age (mean ± SD) 72.9 ± 9.3
Age Range 23-92.22
% Female 56.6
CUBIC Project /cbica/projects/chrisclark
PI for CUBIC Access Approval Christos Davatzikos
PENN-ADC

AD
Value V01 V02
CN 54 1
MCI 20 2
AD 15 1
nan 11 25
early MCI 3
dementia 1
Vascular Dementia 1
